title: rubus argenteus subsp. gneissogenes
intro: Rubus argenteus subsp. gneissogenes is a subspecies of the silver bramble, a type of wild raspberry native to South Australia. The medicinal properties of Rubus argenteus subsp. gneissogenes include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant are thought to include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and aiding in the management of various digestive issues. The herbal preparations of Rubus argenteus subsp. gneissogenes may include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
